paragraphs: BTC sits at $77,375 (+0.74% 24h) with breadth at 10/20 green and DEX volume $4.48B, 22% under the 7d average. Fear and Greed lifted to 30 from yesterday's 25, the first day out of Extreme Fear this cycle. AIXBT named two simultaneous selloff channels in the same session: Hormuz de-escalation runs disinflationary while Fed minutes hike-risk runs hawkish, and AI/tech institutional overweight sits exposed to either tail.

Perps scan printed QUIET for the third consecutive run today. All 25 assessed assets stay NEUTRAL on the 09:20Z slice. PLAY ripped +60.95% 24h on funding repricing +0.0973pp over the 7d average to +0.0730%/8h, sitting 0.007pp under the DISTRIBUTION trigger. XAN landed first appearance with open interest +319% 24h, funding -0.7133%/8h, and a 56.7x volume ratio against taker buy 50.17% just under the CATALYST gate. Both setups read as extreme positioning without a regime print to chase.

The book sits at five open positions stacking three Peak narratives. Hyperliquid Peak carries HYPE and ASTER, Decentralized compute Peak carries EIGEN and AKT, and the standalone BCH SHORT runs the legacy-alt bleed. Sector concentration in AI-compute and perp-DEX is heavy.
market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · ride the open book through the macro fragility. Skip-day on new entries with the perps tape NEUTRAL and the chop regime unresolved.

current_positions.thesis_note: Hyperliquid Peak 4/5 RIDE w/ trail confirmed; HYPE flipped DOGE for #9 by market cap today, top-trader long/short +0.18 over 7 days
current_positions.watch: funding pushing past +0.03%/8h fires the MOMENTUM regime on the +33.67% 7d run

current_positions.thesis_note: Still absent from perps slice and from token-movers (AM/midday/PM); structural smart-money-exit bleed thesis intact, no relief catalyst on calendar
current_positions.watch: bounce to $355-360 with funding turning positive flips the smart-money-exit read

current_positions.thesis_note: AI agents and Decentralized compute both hold Peak 5/5 RIDE; AKT joined the sector bid this morning, ASTER joined the perp-DEX bid this afternoon, so sector confluence sustains
current_positions.watch: any AI-compute sector rotation drives the next leg; break above $0.235 with volume confirms

current_positions.thesis_note: Decentralized compute holds Peak 5/5 RIDE; +3.93% from morning fire, CoinGecko trending hold extended through midday, PM token-movers print holds the $0.9042 area
current_positions.watch: $1.00 to $1.05 resistance pocket on light vol/mcap; break with volume confirmation extends the run

current_positions.thesis_note: Day-1 ride; Hyperliquid Peak confluence intact, narrative-tracker holds the perp-DEX 4/5 RIDE w/ trail; -0.35% from afternoon fire on a chop tape
current_positions.watch: $0.78 resistance is the immediate level; break with volume confirms the squeeze leg toward $0.85 then $1.00

watchlist.trigger: first pullback to $620 that holds with funding staying positive AND top-trader long/short rotating back above 1.00
thesis: Narrative-tracker promoted Privacy/ZK from Rising to a full 5/5 RIDE today after the tape caught up. ZEC re-entered CoinGecko trending after one day off the list.
Top-trader long/short ratio at 0.73 sits net short with -0.04 over 7 days. Funding sits +0.0038%/8h positive — the first half of the trigger condition met today.
RAIL flipped red intraday, so the second privacy name failed to print green alongside ZEC. The sector bid fragments, with capital concentrating on the established leader.

watchlist.trigger: first pullback to $3.50 area that holds with ZEC also holding above $640 OR a second privacy name continues to print green same session
thesis: RAIL direction-flipped intraday: morning +23.5%, midday +11.9%, PM -3.3%. The 7d magnitude still holds intact at +203% on day-3 of the breakout stack.
Narrative-tracker promoted Privacy/ZK to a full 5/5 RIDE today. RAIL sits inside the privacy-DeFi rail thesis with $92M TVL and real shielded usage.
Intraday distribution weakens the pullback-entry timing. Trigger waits for a $3.50 hold with ZEC above $640, or a second privacy name green alongside.

watchlist.trigger: pct_24h reverses past -10% with open interest rolling negative AND short liquidations clearing the 7d p75 of $396K, OR funding re-spikes past +0.04%/8h with pct_24h going flat-to-red
watchlist.invalidation: close above the 7d high before trigger fires
thesis: NIL ran another leg to +9.38% 24h on open interest +26.67% 24h. The +471.96% 7d build is the heaviest position growth across today's perps universe.
Top-trader long/short fell 0.84 over 7 days while open interest nearly quintupled. Smart money cut roughly 43% of long conviction while retail piled in.
Funding flipped negative to -0.0110%/8h as shorts started paying premium against the rally. The structural unwind waits for a funding re-spike or a sharp price reversal.

watchlist.trigger: pct_24h push past +10% with open interest reversing negative AND short liquidations clearing the 7d p75 of $1.6M
thesis: FIDA fell out of the perps scanner on the evening slice — no fresh derivatives read tonight. The cash-and-carry footprint thesis stays structural, not single-day dependent.
Open interest built +21.97% over 7 days with price +73.29% on the same window, top-trader long/short balanced at 1.11. The arb load loads squeeze fuel under the price.
Carry forward one more session. If FIDA stays out of the universe tomorrow, the data gap forces a drop regardless of thesis intact.

watchlist.trigger: funding pushes past +0.08%/8h with pct_24h going flat-to-red, OR pct_24h reverses past -5% with open interest flipping negative
thesis: PLAY ran +60.95% 24h on +1.15% 7d. The entire move happened in the last 24 hours, with funding repricing +0.0973pp over the 7d average to +0.0730%/8h.
Top-trader long/short ratio at 1.43 sits down 0.51 over 7 days. Smart money cut conviction through the rip while open interest doubled to +47.58% 24h on +85% 7d.
Volume ratio at 0.81x reads under the prior-week average. The spike happened on thin participation — leverage-fueled pump, not real demand.

evaluations.note: Day 4/multi-week evening eval. +4.77% from fire on the evening slice — new MFE for the position, exceeding the prior +4.26% set on day 3. Narrative-tracker confirmed Hyperliquid Peak 4/5 RIDE w/ trail through three calendar-day reads today. AIXBT 09:00Z names HYPE whale battle $104M vs $80M with USDC transfer volume at ATH on Solana — institutional and on-chain liquidity both confirm the bid. Funding +0.0062%/8h sits 0.0238pp under the +0.03 MOMENTUM gate; if it pushes past the gate, the position picks up a fresh regime stamp on tomorrow's slice. Same-direction signal continues to suppress (no pyramiding). RIDE.

Day 3/7 evening eval. BCH absent from the 25-asset perps slice (09:20Z re-run) and from token-movers across all three runs today (AM/midday/PM). Price_at_eval estimated near $345 from market-context naming BCH as one of the top-20 majors closing red on a +0.74% BTC day. High/low estimates carry similar uncertainty bands as prior evals today. Structural smart-money-exit thesis intact. Invalidation $370 holds well clear. RIDE.

Day 2/7 evening eval. EIGEN absent from the evening perps slice and from PM token-movers winners/losers/trending. Price_at_eval estimated near morning fire ($0.2299). AI agents and Decentralized compute both hold Peak 5/5 RIDE through the third narrative-tracker read of the day. AKT joined the sector bid this morning, ASTER joined the perp-DEX bid this afternoon — sector confluence sustains across three positions now. Invalidation $0.205 holds. RIDE.

Day 1/7 evening eval. PM token-movers print holds AKT near +11% 24h, in line with the afternoon's +10% read at $0.9042. CoinGecko trending hold extended through three of today's three token-movers runs. Decentralized compute Peak 5/5 RIDE intact. Position green at +3.93% from morning fire. RIDE.

Day 1/7 evening eval. ASTER printed +1.33% 24h on the 09:20Z perps slice at $0.7138 — -0.35% from the afternoon fire at $0.7163. Funding -0.0058%/8h (shorts paying longs) holds the squeeze setup. Top-trader long/short at 2.89 with -0.82 over 7d means smart money continued the distribution leg into the evening, keeping the trail tight per the original risk callout. Narrative-tracker confirms Hyperliquid Peak 4/5 RIDE w/ trail for the third read today. Invalidation $0.67 holds well clear. RIDE.

add_watchlist.trigger: funding pushes past +0.08%/8h with pct_24h going flat-to-red, OR pct_24h reverses past -5% with open interest flipping negative
thesis: PLAY ran +60.95% 24h on +1.15% 7d. The entire move happened in the last 24 hours, with funding repricing +0.0973pp over the 7d average to +0.0730%/8h.
Top-trader long/short ratio at 1.43 sits down 0.51 over 7 days. Smart money cut conviction through the rip while open interest doubled to +47.58% 24h on +85% 7d.
Volume ratio at 0.81x reads under the prior-week average. The spike happened on thin participation — leverage-fueled pump, not real demand.
named_risks: Funding cool-off without a price reversal removes the trigger pathway. The pump may simply consolidate without a flush.
Microcap open interest at $18.7M means squeezes and flushes both run irrespective of fundamentals on coordinated flow.
